Headline: No trains between Kimball and Southport
ShortDescription: Brown Line service has been temporarily suspended between Kimball and Southport due to a loss of power.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
Brown Line service has been temporarily suspended between Kimball and Southport due to a loss of power in the area of Rockwell.

As a result, trains are operating only between Southport and Clark/Lake at this time.

Consider other service alternatives that may serve your trip, such as nearby bus routes, or using buses to other rail lines.

These may include:

#11 Lincoln

#81 Lawrence

#82 Kimball-Homan

Shuttle buses are available from Kimball to Belmont provide connecting service through the affected area in both directions.

See station personnel for further assistance, and pay attention to announcements on trains and at stations for service information.

 

We are working to restore service as quickly as possible. Allow extra travel time.
